column1: 英語はもちろん、中国語も話せる。
column2: えいごはもちろん、ちゅうごくごもはなせる。
column3: She can speak Chinese as well as English, of course.
column4: はもちろん (not only ~ but also / of course ~ and more)
column5: Noun + はもちろん + Noun/Clause + も
column6: X はもちろん Y も = 'of course X, and Y too'; X is so obvious it goes without saying, and Y is also true
column8: はもちろん = obvious given + adds more; だけでなく～も = not only but also (neutral negation); は言うまでもなく = needless to say (more formal)
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:はもちろん source:authored scaffold:pending-audio
